ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is relevant and consistent with persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively.
baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4 - A standard response that maintains persona consistency and naturalness but lacks the contextual control needed for this specific
The response is relevant to the context but lacks urgency and persuasiveness, which are important for a merchant persona in this scenario. It could be more natural if phrased with less formality.
